message:
perf(scheduler): shrink MIN_DENSE_LEN, re-enable overflow pre-allocation

Two complementary tuning changes to ScheduledSet:

- Reduce MIN_DENSE_LEN from 256 to 64: the dense bitmap was over-
  provisioned for typical small-to-medium workloads, wasting 1.5 KiB
  per scheduler instance.  64 slots still covers the common case while
  letting larger workloads spill into the overflow set naturally.

- Switch back to with_capacity_and_hasher(capacity, ...) on the overflow
  DetHashSet: the previous commit removed the pre-reserve to avoid
  wasted allocation when the dense bitmap sufficed, but this caused
  pathological rehashing when many tasks spill.  Using
  with_capacity_and_hasher gives the allocator a hint without the
  separate reserve call.

- New test: scheduler_with_capacity_preallocates_overflow_set verifying
  the overflow set has at least the requested capacity after construction

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
